helpful: The provisioned questions presented and petition supplied the issue, claimed split, and vehicle details.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, Sixth Circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration anchors.
CourtListener opinion search corroborated authorities on both sides of the asserted split.
gaps: No brief in opposition was available because the United States waived a response.
The petition extraction was truncated during the district-court appendix.
notes: The corpus service worked but the broad grant-prior query required substantial ranged transfer and was not subject-matter matched. The provisioned record and base-rate tables were more decision-useful.
